global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a central focus on the brand message and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting transparency in financial services with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, rounded rectangle shape in the center with a light green background.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A smaller rounded rectangle shape overlaying the background, also in light green.

elements.label: Central shape
elements.description: A larger square shape in the center with a light green background, featuring a circular cutout.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular shape positioned towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned towards the bottom right of the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold text in the center of the ad stating 'Your money, clearer No hidden fees' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer No hidden fees

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'ClearLedger' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Claim reward' in a clear, inviting font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, key elements include brand logo and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your money, clearer, No hidden fees, ClearLedger, Claim reward
